title: Default SECRET_KEY in Docker auth
description: deploy/docker/auth.py uses hardcoded default if env var not set.
recommendation: Fail startup if SECRET_KEY not provided

title: No OpenSSF scorecard data
description: OpenSSF scorecard returned empty. No baseline security metrics.

title: No static type checker configuration
description: No mypy/pyright config or py.typed marker. 58% coverage with heavy Any.
recommendation: Add pyright config, enable in CI

title: Duplicate files in repository
description: adaptive_crawler copy.py (exact duplicate) and .back.py files checked in.

title: Monolithic utils.py (3,778 lines)
description: Utility functions for HTML, URLs, errors, robots, hashing all in one file.

title: Broad exception catches without custom hierarchy
description: Many bare except Exception patterns. Single custom exception only.

title: No automated test execution in release CI
description: Release pipeline validates version but does not run pytest.
recommendation: Add pytest step before PyPI upload

title: Missing SECURITY.md in community profile
description: SECURITY.md exists but not detected by GitHub community profile API.

title: Playwright version unpinned at patch level
No formal code coverage metrics
description: 185 test files but no pytest-cov or coverage badge.

title: CrawlState lacks on_state_change callback
description: save/load exists but no change notification. Prior analysis flagged this.

title: Excellent strategy pattern (55+ classes)
description: Clean ABC hierarchy. Runtime composition via FilterChain.
